name: My Friend Maisy
overview: For decades, the Maisy books have captivated children with their endearing characters, charming, simple tales and vibrant art style. Like the popular books, the new series will feature stories that are highly engaging, yet calm, warm, and easy, without lots of noise or conflict. ‘My Friend Maisy’ is a show for any time of day - before bed, in the car, or during family together time on the couch.
